About

Hi, I'm Xander. I'm a Senior Creative specialising in logo and brand design, with 7+ years of experience crafting cohesive, premium visual identities.

I turn complex briefs into concept-driven, engaging visuals and scalable design systems, with a focus on clarity, consistency, and impact.

I embrace AI tools and creative apps to support ideation, streamline workflows, and push the boundaries of what's possible in design.
